PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Swendsen for Christina Bidiger.

The Court granted the petition (signing an order for the same in open court) stating that there were no other appearances, no objections, or will contests.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
